description: Image messages: put image files beside scenario.json under public/scenarios/image-test/. In each message, set optional "image": { "url": "filename.png" }. Use a relative "url" (e.g. test-image.png) for assets in this folder—they load as /scenarios/image-test/<url>. Absolute URLs starting with http(s):// or / pass through unchanged. Optional "caption" shows under the image; "text" adds a line below the caption. Omit "caption" when you only need body text plus the image.
